question: The chart shows the share of product ratings by category. Based on the values shown next to each point, which statement is correct?

options.A: Price has the highest value among all the categories.
options.B: Quality and Price have the same value.
options.C: Design has the highest value among all the categories.
options.D: Delivery has a higher value than Price.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
